description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, chest-like structure adorned with vibrant, hand-painted floral motifs and geometric patterns on all visible surfaces. The front panel features a large, colorful bouquet of flowers and a central scene depicting a quaint village with houses, trees, and a pathway. The upper section includes two small, tiered shelves on either side, each decorated with large, stylized flowers and bordered with intricate checkered and Greek key patterns. The sides of the kiosk continue the floral theme, each displaying a different bouquet arrangement. The back panel is higher than the front, with decorative cutouts and additional painted flowers, giving the kiosk a festive and artisanal appearance. The overall design suggests a traditional, folk-art influence, making it visually striking and inviting in an urban setting.
description: A hand-painted, floral-themed kiosk with a chest-like base, decorative shelves, and vibrant folk-art motifs. The front features a village scene and colorful bouquets, while the sides and back are adorned with intricate patterns and flowers.
description_view_0: The left side displays a large bouquet of multicolored flowers and a clear view of the tiered, flower-decorated shelves.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the tall, solid back panel with decorative cutouts and no painted details visible.
description_view_2: The right side features a different bouquet of flowers and the same tiered shelf structure as the left.
description_view_3: The front view highlights the central village scene, two floral bouquets, and the symmetrical, tiered shelves with prominent flower motifs.
attribute_roof_design: flat, solid wood top with painted decorative motifs and no overhangs or awnings
attribute_architectural_style: traditional folk-art with vibrant, hand-painted floral and geometric patterns
